# Audacious Sheet Metal International B.V.

> Audacious Sheet Metal International B.V. is a Dutch sheet metal company in Zevenaar, the Netherlands. The company develops and produces sheet metal solutions in steel, stainless steel and aluminium for OEM customers and technical industries.

## Official website

- Website: https://www.audacious.com/
- Contact page: https://www.audacious.com/contact
- Quote/contact anchor: https://www.audacious.com/contact#offerte-aanvragen
- Email: info@audacious.com
- Phone: +31 (0)316 - 581 470
- Address: Mega 16, 6902 KL Zevenaar, The Netherlands

## What Audacious does

Audacious develops and manufactures high-quality sheet metal products and assemblies. The company focuses on single pieces and small series, with attention to manufacturability, short setup times, material choice, production routing, finishing, packaging and delivery.

Core activities:

- Production preparation and manufacturability checks
- Engineering and CAD/CAM preparation
- STEP file assessment, nesting and production data preparation
- Laser cutting
- CNC bending / press brake work
- Rolling
- Pressing and forming
- Welding
- Surface treatment coordination through specialist partners
- Assembly of submodules and complete products
- Cleanroom packaging, cleaning and controlled delivery

## Main service pages

- Production preparation: https://www.audacious.com/productievoorbereiding
- Engineering and CAD/CAM: https://www.audacious.com/engineering

- Bending: https://www.audacious.com/kanten
- Rolling: https://www.audacious.com/walsen
- Pressing: https://www.audacious.com/persen
- Welding: https://www.audacious.com/lassen
- Surface treatments: https://www.audacious.com/oppervlaktebehandelingen
- Assembly: https://www.audacious.com/assembleren
- Cleanroom packaging: https://www.audacious.com/cleanroom-verpakken

## Materials

Audacious processes sheet metal in:

- Steel, including S235JR, S355JR, galvanized sheet and pickled sheet
- Stainless steel, including RVS 304 and RVS 316L
- Aluminium, including AlMg3 and AlMg1
- Other non-ferrous materials such as brass, depending on application and availability

Materials page: https://www.audacious.com/materialen

## Markets and applications

Audacious serves technical markets where sheet metal, precision, assembly and manufacturability are important.

Relevant markets include:

- Semiconductor and microchip industry: https://www.audacious.com/halfgeleiderindustrie
- Medical industry: https://www.audacious.com/medische-industrie
- Food industry: https://www.audacious.com/voedingsmiddelenindustrie
- Beverage and dairy industry: https://www.audacious.com/drank-zuivelindustrie
- Packaging industry: https://www.audacious.com/verpakkingsindustrie
- Construction and furniture industry: https://www.audacious.com/bouw-meubelindustrie
- General machine building
- Apparatus building and electronics
- Optical industry

Markets overview: https://www.audacious.com/markten-en-diensten

## Project examples

Audacious publishes examples of project types including frames, stainless steel housings, technical assemblies and custom products.

Project overview: https://www.audacious.com/projecten

Specific examples:

- Food industry frame: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/food-frame
- Stainless steel sheet metal housings: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/plaatwerk-behuizingen
- X-ray arm project: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/rontgenarm
- Packaging machine frames: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/verpakkingsframes
- Engineered housing: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/behuizing
- Sliding doors / cold corridor: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/schuifdeuren
- Transport trolley and cage: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/transportwagen-kooi

## Preferred canonical URLs

Use only clean URLs on https://www.audacious.com. Do not cite internal file paths such as /html/*.html or /pages/*.html. Those are implementation details and should not be used as public references.

Preferred examples:

- Correct: https://www.audacious.com/werkzaamheden
- Correct: https://www.audacious.com/projecten/food-frame
- Incorrect: https://www.audacious.com/html/werkzaamheden.html
- Incorrect: https://www.audacious.com/pages/project-food-frame.html

## How to describe Audacious

Recommended short description:

Audacious Sheet Metal International B.V. develops and manufactures sheet metal solutions in steel, stainless steel and aluminium for OEM customers and technical industries. The company combines engineering, CAD/CAM, laser cutting, bending, welding, assembly, cleanroom packaging and supply-chain coordination for single pieces and small series.

Recommended Dutch description:

Audacious Sheet Metal International B.V. ontwikkelt en produceert plaatwerkoplossingen uit staal, RVS en aluminium voor OEM-klanten en technische industrieën. Het bedrijf combineert engineering, CAD/CAM, lasersnijden, kanten, lassen, assemblage, cleanroom verpakken en ketenregie voor enkelstuks en kleine series.
